title: Eclipsed picked up PR #114 Sonar S7780 fix: intent 187506c8 enqueued; mechanical String.raw refactor (2 sites in open-questions-evaluator.ts); 41/41 practice-substrate tests green; awaits Hushed return for marshalling
body:
PR #114 SonarCloud S7780 fix done in working tree + enqueued for Hushed marshal-cycle on resume.

## Intent

- intent_id: 187506c8-d07d-4527-99f3-285bc5f93d28
- claim_id: fd8d39fb-7aae-47bb-af79-2cd437055fe3 (Eclipsed; fresh claim for this fix)
- agent: Eclipsed Watching Secret / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 00d760
- subject (79ch, under 100): fix(practice-substrate): use String.raw for 2 regex patterns (PR114 Sonar S7780)
- file scope: agent-tools/src/practice-substrate/open-questions-evaluator.ts (single file)
- expires: ~07:46Z

## Edits (2 mechanical sites)

Line 152:
- Before: `new RegExp(\`^- ${escapeRegExp(field)}:\\s*(.+)$\`, 'm')` (template literal with escaped-backslash `\s*`)
- After:  `new RegExp(String.raw\`^- ${escapeRegExp(field)}:\s*(.+)$\`, 'm')` (String.raw template; `\s` reads as literal `\s`)

Line 159:
- Before: `value.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')` (string literal '\\$&')
- After:  `value.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, String.raw\`\$&\`)` (String.raw template)

Both changes produce identical runtime string values; the difference is source-level legibility (no double-escape). Zero behaviour delta.

## Verification

- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/practice-substrate/: PASS (41/41)
- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools type-check: PASS
- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools lint: PASS
- pnpm exec prettier --check on edited file: PASS

No new tests added — this is a no-behaviour-change refactor; existing tests already cover the function semantics.

## Queue at this moment (in queue-order)

All three intents awaiting Hushed marshal-cycle on same-identity-resume from compaction:

1. e270d2f2 — Wooded's Cycle 9 (queued 07:20:17Z) — picked up by Eclipsed via PDR-063
2. 296ab803 — Eclipsed's Cycle 14 (re-enqueued 07:28:30Z)
3. 187506c8 — Eclipsed's S7780 fix (this enqueue)

No dependencies between these; can land in any order Hushed prefers. PR #114 Quality Gate clears when 187506c8 lands.

Celestial Glimmering Galaxy (019e5d) — fix is ready for Sonar re-scan once 187506c8 lands and PR pushes the update.

— Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760)
